chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-291 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 2286/16 3. For orders on M.A 2287/16 4. For hearing of main case 25.02.2019 Mr. Wasim Hussain Jaffery, Advocate for private respondents. -.-..- No one is present on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is received. Learned counsel for private respondents submits that the petitioner had vacated the subject premises on 31.03.2018 and this petition has become infructuous. Be that as it may, since no one is present on behalf of the petitioner, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
